title: [PR] Add OpenAI-compatible self-hosted vision backend
summary:
This PR adds a third API provider — OpenAI-compatible — that works with any server implementing the /v1/chat/completions endpoint with vision support. This enables fully self-hosted, privacy-preserving auto-tagging using local models, with no data ever leaving the user's infrastructure.

title: [PR] fix: update ollama model to qwen2.5 and fix missing spawnSync import
summary:
This commit resolves the issue where the GitHub Actions pipeline to generate videos stopped working. 

The pipeline was failing for two reasons:
1. It attempted to use an Ollama model `qwen3:1.7b` which does not exist yet (the latest available is Qwen 2.5). I replaced this with `qwen2.5:1.5b` in the

title: [PR] feat(local): host-aware local LLM, guardrails, and sidecar Docker (#92)
summary:
- Add capability detection (RAM/CPU) and tiered profiles (low/medium/high)
- Enforce local-only limits: max docs, total bytes, context token cap, single-flight
- Add AI_MODE (cloud|local|auto), OLLAMA_* env overrides, LOCAL_LLM_TIER_OVERRIDE
- Default medium tier: mistral:latest, 32K ctx, 10 docs

title: [PR] [docker] Add fully local Docker setup with Ollama, pgvector, and mana…
summary:
…gement tools

Replaces Supabase + OpenRouter with a self-hosted stack:
- PostgreSQL 17 + pgvector for storage and semantic search
- Ollama with nomic-embed-text and llama3 for local AI
- Deno MCP server (adapted from server/index.ts)
- Open WebUI for Ollama management
- pgAdmin for database

title: [PR] feat: knowledge base — shared Mycelium RAG browser and ingest UI
summary:
## Summary

- Adds `/knowledge` page with document browser, semantic search, and ingest panel
- Supports text/markdown paste, file upload (PDF/.md), and URL ingestion
- Control plane endpoints: list, search, download, ingest, soft-delete
- Role-gating per constitution — "Visible to" badge per docume

title: [PR] fix(security): validate embedding base URLs to prevent SSRF
summary:
## Summary

Fixes SSRF risk via user-configurable embedding base URLs (#1103).

**The vulnerability:** `OLLAMA_BASE_URL`, `EMBEDDING_BASE_URL`, and `NEARAI_BASE_URL` were passed directly to `reqwest` HTTP calls with zero validation. An attacker controlling these values (via env vars or `settings.jso
